testcase.name: tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade_works
testcase.failure:
Snapshot of code has changed: old vs new Code as.data.frame(add_grade_column(tbl))[1, ] - Condition - Warning in `do.call()`: - unable to translate 'MedDRA System Organ Class - <U+00A0><U+00A0><U+00A0><U+00A0>MedDRA Preferred Term' to native encoding - Output - MedDRA System Organ Class 
<U+00A0><U+00A0><U+00A0><U+00A0>MedDRA Preferred Term Grade Placebo 
(N = 86) Xanomeline High Dose 
(N = 84) Xanomeline Low Dose 
(N = 84) - 1 - Any adverse events - - Any Grade - 26,0/86,<U+00A0>30.233% 42,0/84,<U+00A0>50.000% 40,0/84,<U+00A0>47.619% + Output + MedDRA System Organ Class 
 MedDRA Preferred Term Grade Placebo 
(N = 86) Xanomeline High Dose 
(N = 84) Xanomeline Low Dose 
(N = 84) + 1 - Any adverse events - - Any Grade - 26,0/86, 30.233% 42,0/84, 50.000% 40,0/84, 47.619% * Run `testthat::snapshot_accept("tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade", "testthat")` to accept the change. * Run `testthat::snapshot_review("tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade", "testthat")` to review the change.

testcase.name: tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade_include_overall_works
testcase.failure:
